title: lastrea motleyana
intro: Lastrea motleyana, also known as the Motley's fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lastrea motleyana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and improve respiratory issues, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various ailments. The plant can be prepared through decoction, infusion, or topical application, making it a versatile herbal preparation for treating various health conditions.
